root_cause_summary: CRITICAL: Cilium agent (CNI plugin) failed to start, preventing all pod networking. The test failed at cluster bootstrap stage before any service-level testing could occur.

cluster_status.description: Cluster nodes are stuck in NotReady state due to CNI plugin unavailability
findings: 2 nodes (kind-control-plane, kind-worker) are in NotReady status
CoreDNS pods cannot be created (stuck in Pending state)
No application workloads could be deployed
Cluster bootstrap failed at network initialization stage

primary_root_cause.issue: Cilium agent daemon pods failed to start and remain unavailable
primary_root_cause.lifecycle: Pods were created and killed; did not recover
primary_root_cause.cni_socket_error: /var/run/cilium/cilium.sock: connect: no such file or directory (does not exist)
primary_root_cause.consequence: Kubelet CNI plugin invocation failed for all workload pods

failure_sequence.details: Failed to pull image 'quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest' with HTTP 401 UNAUTHORIZED
failure_sequence.error_log: failed to resolve reference "quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest": unexpected status from HEAD request to https://quay.io/v2/cilium/cilium-ci-generic/manifests/latest: 401 UNAUTHORIZED

failure_sequence.details: Pods cilium-gpbd2 and cilium-xd6d6 created but could not pass health check
failure_sequence.startup_probe_error: Get "http://127.0.0.1:9879/healthz": dial tcp 127.0.0.1:9879: connect: connection refused

failure_sequence.details: All Cilium support pods were stopped, leaving the system in broken state
CoreDNS, Grafana, Prometheus pods fail to create network sandbox
failure_sequence.cni_error_details: plugin type="cilium-cni" failed (add): unable to connect to Cilium agent: failed to create cilium agent client after 30.000000 seconds timeout

failure_sequence.reason: Nodes marked NotReady, services cannot be created
failure_sequence.details: Test harness cannot proceed with service datapath testing

affected_components.issue: Image pull failure - authentication error on quay.io
affected_components.impact: Operator cannot manage Cilium resource lifecycle

affected_components.issue: Startup health check failure and pod termination
affected_components.impact: CNI plugin unavailable on nodes; pods cannot network

affected_components.issue: Binary is present but agent service socket missing
affected_components.impact: CNI invocations timeout waiting for agent socket
DNS resolution unavailable; services cannot be discovered

affected_components.issue: No pod networking available; services cannot be created

failure_categories.description: Cilium operator image pull failed due to 401 UNAUTHORIZED from quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest
failure_categories.likelihood: This suggests a missing or expired image pull secret for the CI/generic image variant

failure_categories.description: Cilium agent health check endpoint (http://127.0.0.1:9879/healthz) was not responsive
root_cause_possibilities: Agent process did not start correctly

failure_categories.description: Kubelet could not communicate with Cilium CNI plugin socket after 30-second timeout
failure_categories.consequence: All pods requiring network setup failed to reach scheduled state

why_test_failed.test_objective: Verify Cilium service datapath functionality: ClusterIP, NodePort, endpoint tracking, L7 policies, DNS resolution
why_test_failed.reason: Cilium CNI plugin failed to initialize; cluster bootstrap incomplete
why_test_failed.actual_failure_point: Cluster initialization, before any services could be deployed

recommendations.action: Fix Cilium operator image pull authentication
recommendations.details: The image 'quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest' is returning 401 UNAUTHORIZED. This suggests:
steps: Verify quay.io credentials and image pull secrets in kube-system namespace
Check if the image tag exists and is accessible from your network
Consider using a pre-built local image or an image mirror
Verify the CI image variant is available in your image registry
recommendations.technical_details: Cilium operator is configured to use 'quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest', but this requires authentication that is currently failing

recommendations.details: The agent daemonset pods were created but failed startup health checks
steps: Examine cilium-agent pod logs before startup probe failure (if available in container logs)
Check for OOM, CPU throttling, or disk space issues on nodes
Verify kernel compatibility (BPF subsystem availability)
Review mount points and volume attachments for agent DaemonSet
Check RBAC permissions for cilium-agent service account

recommendations.action: Ensure CNI socket availability on nodes
recommendations.details: The CNI plugin socket must be created by the Cilium agent before kubelet attempts to schedule pods
steps: Verify /var/run/cilium/ directory permissions and mount points
Ensure host mount bindings for cilium socket are correct in DaemonSet
Check for file descriptor limits on the node
Verify containerd/docker CNI integration is configured correctly

recommendations.action: Use local built images for CI/operator
recommendations.details: Instead of pulling from quay.io, use the local built images from seriousum
steps: Build operator image locally: docker build -t localhost:5000/seriousum/operator-generic:local ...
Load into kind cluster: kind load docker-image --name=kind localhost:5000/seriousum/operator-generic:local
Set CILIUM_OPERATOR_IMAGE and CILIUM_OPERATOR_TAG environment variables in test runner
Ensure image pull policy is set to IfNotPresent

recommendations.action: Add cluster startup diagnostics to test framework
recommendations.details: Enhance test robustness by verifying cluster readiness before test execution
steps: Add pre-test hook to verify all system pods are ready (kube-system, cilium)
Implement CNI socket availability check before proceeding
Add timeout and retry logic for pod sandbox creation
Generate detailed diagnostics report on bootstrap failure

recommendations.details: Ensure cluster has resources to run Cilium with all support pods
steps: Verify node disk space (cilium uses etcd and local caches)
Check available memory on nodes (cilium-agent, operator, envoy all memory-hungry)
Confirm BPF subsystem is enabled in kernel: grep BPF /boot/config-$(uname -r)
Verify iproute2 version compatibility

recommendations.details: The 30-second CNI timeout may be too aggressive for slow environments
steps: Consider increasing CNI operation timeout if resource-constrained
Implement exponential backoff for CNI retries
Add pre-flight checks to warn about resource constraints

recommendations.details: Add to test documentation: 'quay.io/cilium/cilium-ci-generic:latest' may require authentication
steps: Document authentication requirements in README
Provide examples for local image building and loading
Add troubleshooting guide for image pull failures

test_impact_analysis.regression_risk: MODERATE - This is an environmental/bootstrap issue, not a code regression. The underlying service datapath code may be working correctly, but this cannot be verified until CNI works

next_steps.action: Fix image authentication or use local images
Re-run test with fixed operator image
If CNI health check still fails, collect agent logs for debugging
Implement pre-flight checks in test runner
